'''fangupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvula|uvula]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvula|uvula]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fangupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fængipith|fængipith]] || [[word:fængipij|fængipij]] || [[word:fængipish|fængipish]] || [[word:fængipi|fængipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fangunguputh|fangunguputh]] || [[word:fangungupuj|fangungupuj]] || [[word:fangungupush|fangungupush]] || [[word:fangungupu|fangungupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanguputh|fanguputh]] || [[word:fangupuj|fangupuj]] || [[word:fangupush|fangupush]] || [[word:fangupu|fangupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fangufputh|fangufputh]] || [[word:fangufpuj|fangufpuj]] || [[word:fangufpush|fangufpush]] || [[word:fangufpuf|fangufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fanguputhu|fanguputhu]] || [[word:fangupuju|fangupuju]] || [[word:fangupushu|fangupushu]] || [[word:fangupuku|fangupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fanguputh|fanguputh]] || [[word:fangupuj|fangupuj]] || [[word:fangupush|fangupush]] || [[word:fangupu|fangupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fanguputhul|fanguputhul]] || [[word:fangupujul|fangupujul]] || [[word:fangupushul|fangupushul]] || [[word:fangupukul|fangupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fanguputhuthu|fanguputhuthu]] || [[word:fangupujuju|fangupujuju]] || [[word:fangupushushu|fangupushushu]] || [[word:fangupuku|fangupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fanguputhun|fanguputhun]] || [[word:fangupujun|fangupujun]] || [[word:fangupushun|fangupushun]] || [[word:fangupukun|fangupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fanguputhuoro|fanguputhuoro]] || [[word:fangupujuoro|fangupujuoro]] || [[word:fangupushuoro|fangupushuoro]] || [[word:fangupukuoro|fangupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
